name: 10-capability-merge
description: Post-merge form: the observed array contains a single net:egress entry whose evidence[] holds two evidence record refs (ev-002, ev-003), representing two sandbox observations of the same capability collapsed per the schema-rule merging rule.
notes: The merging rule requires emitters to collapse (id, qualifiers) duplicates within a single array at emit time, not defer collapsing to consumers. Evidence ref order within the merged array is lexicographic (ev-002, ev-003). Both observations see the same host/port/scheme tuple, so they collapse; if any qualifier differed (e.g., different port), they would remain two distinct entries. Confidence field absent per v0.1 deferral; if re-added as evidenceConfidence, the merge rule would take max of contributing confidences.
